_comment: ML training defaults. Tree trainers (Main_4, scripts) read test_size, random_state, and model blocks. Main_6 / Main_7 PyTorch notebooks read neural_network.* from here. See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.

sequence_rnn._comment: Main_8 defaults (full dataset). See sequence_rnn_production for larger models.
sequence_rnn._dev_subsample_note: Main_8 §2 flags SUBSAMPLE_RUNS / SUBSAMPLE_MAX_RUNS override these defaults

sequence_rnn_production._comment: Suggested overrides when features_targets has many runs (not applied automatically).

neural_network._comment: Main_6 (exit-plane) and Main_7 (full-profile) SimpleNN notebooks; omitted keys use notebook fallbacks. h1–h3: hidden layer widths.

tuning._comment: Optuna (Section 6b) when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True. n_trials / epochs_per_trial / validation_fraction / timeout_seconds (null = no cap).
